title: Day 4 Action Decision
recommended_path: PATH B — Core calculators crawled but not indexed

rationale.truth: All 10 core calculators are INDEXING_ALLOWED, crawled June 1. No technical issues. Google simply hasn't indexed them yet.
rationale.why_not_A: No calculators confirmed indexed — cannot proceed with internal link push
rationale.why_not_C: Already crawled — not a discovery issue
rationale.why_not_D: No technical issues found — all pass canonical, robots, sitemap checks
rationale.why_B: Content and value signals need strengthening. Best action: improve internal links from indexed pages (guides, blogs, decisions) to core calculators.

recommended_actions: Add 1 contextual link from each indexed guide page to its target calculator (already present via 'Open the calculator →' link)
Add 1 link from each indexed blog post to relevant core calculators (already present via relatedCalculators)
Add core calculators to homepage 'Make a Smart Financial Decision' section if not already featured
Wait 72h for Google to process improved crawl paths
Re-check June 7 (one week after manual request)
